name: Beltane Fire Festival
traditions: Fire procession on Calton Hill; May Queen and Green Man performances; drumming; acrobatic fire dancing; body paint.
historicalBackground: Beltane marks the beginning of summer in the Celtic calendar. The modern festival was revived in Edinburgh in 1988 based on ancient Gaelic traditions.
description: Edinburgh's spectacular revival of the ancient Celtic fire festival, with dramatic processions and fire performances atop Calton Hill.
